---
title: "Quantitative Text Analysis: Unveiling the Power of Words"
author: "Yue Hu"
format: html
knitr: 
    opts_chunk: 
      echo: false
---


![](https://drhuyue.site:10002/sammo3182/figure/logo_camcLogo.png){fig-align="center"}

Welcome to the lecture sources for the *Data Science and Text Analysis, CAMS, CityU*. 
The course is a transformative course that immerses graduate students in the world of Computational Social Science. 
It provides a comprehensive understanding of text extraction, processing, and analysis techniques, including text scraping, preprocessing, structuralization, keyword analysis, and topic modeling. 
See more information in the [course webpage](https://sammo3182.github.io).

- [From Mouth to Mind: An Introduction](00_intro.html)
- [Principles of Text Analysis](01_theory.html)
- [`drhur`(CAMS) version](https://drhuyue.site:10002/sammo3182/miscellaneous/drhur_cams.zip)
